intro: Neisosperma glomeratum is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Australia, classified within the family Annonaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties.
